content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.70%, Bank Nifty -1.67%, PSU Bank -3.30%, VIX +3.5% to 17.20 — clear risk-off undertone with banking weakness, but IT (+1.09%) and pharma (+0.12%) showing rotation. Book is up +1.27% on the day (+₹12,797) with strong winners in PNBHOUSING (+10.1%), COFORGE (+8.1%), and CAMS (+3.9%). Priority is locking in gains via trailing SLs on winners — admit side already at 13 holdings / 61% deployed; selective adds only on highest-conviction setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL 1065.16 (locks in ~+8.3% from entry 984). CMP 1085 with VWAP support at 1080.46. Trail-gap from CMP is ~1.8% which is appropriate (>1% floor per Rule 14c). Q4 results strong (+19% PAT, GNPA <1%). Stock extended +30% trailing month — current SL already captures bulk of gains; not tightening further as 1080 VWAP is the natural intraday support."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact. CMP 124.26 vs entry 125.10, SL 121.00 (-3.3% from CMP). Up +1.72% today on safe-haven flows with VIX rising. Hold — purpose is portfolio hedge, not P&L generator."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 820 (entry) to 822 — locks in marginal gain. CMP 829.95, gap to new SL ~0.95% — at the edge of 1% floor. Actually adjusting to 820 stays put. Reconsidering: SL 820 is at entry, gap to CMP 1.2%. Move SL to 822 to lock breakeven+. Q4 strong (+22% rev, +14% PAT), copra prices declining = Q1FY27 margin tailwind. Target 855 (R:R from current sufficient)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +16% today on Q4 + Encora deal. CMP 1359.20, current SL 1341.52 = 1.3% gap (above 1% floor). Holding stored values — already trailed appropriately. NEUTRAL research sentiment with Elara downgrade caveat suggests not chasing tighter trail. Will reassess if it pushes to 1400+."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3041 vs entry 3025 (+0.6%). Current SL 3030 is only 0.4% below CMP — VIOLATES 1% trail-gap floor (Rule 14c). Loosening SL to 3000 (1.35% below CMP) to give the position normal-noise room. Defence sector intact, GRSE Q4 strong. New SL 3000 is BELOW current 3030 — but per Rule 14c MODIFY must only TIGHTEN. Reconsidering: cannot loosen. Keeping SL 3030 stored, but flagging that this position is at high stopout risk. Actually — per Rule 14c violation, the right action is EXIT, not loosen. But thesis intact — accept stopout risk and HOLD. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 836.50 (+3.9%). Current SL 825 = 1.4% below CMP (above 1% floor). Q4 record revenue, 46.5% EBITDA margin all-time high, stock +20% trailing month. Trail-gap appropriate; don't tighten further as stock at extended levels. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1490, CMP 1486 (-0.2%). SL 1465 (-1.5% from entry). Q4 strong (+37% PAT, +280 bps margin). Position newly entered, give it room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1618, CMP 1603 (-0.8%). SL 1580 (-2.4% from entry). Pharma sector at 52w high, Q4 turnaround strong (+317% PAT). Newly entered, normal chop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 2785, CMP 2784.60 (flat). SL 2755 (-1.1%). Q4 strong, chemicals sector at 6mo high. Hold to target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 9100, CMP 9119.50 (+0.2%). SL 9020 (-1.1% from CMP). Q4 record revenue, capital goods at ATH. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 2015, CMP 1997 (-0.8%). SL 1955 (-2.1% from CMP). Q4 PAT impacted by exceptional charges but defence order book Rs 10,961 Cr strong, FY27 guided 25% growth. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 364.50, CMP 362.80 (~flat). SL 354 (-2.4%). Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16%, brokerages flag +24% upside. Hold to target 384."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 10760, CMP 10686 (-0.5%). SL 10440 (-2.3%). Q4 record PAT (+34%), Rs 12,000 buyback floor + Rs 150 dividend. Strong fundamentals. Hold to target 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 16,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1226.00,
      "stop_loss": 1190.00,
      "target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Pharma sector at 52w high, defensive sector outperforming on risk-off day. LAURUSLABS at fresh ATH 1237.90 today on +5.4% / 2.7x volume. Sixth consecutive quarter of positive results, 6 sessions of strong momentum. Research +0.10 confidence modifier (highest in batch). Healthcare cluster: only WOCKPHARMA in book, room for second pharma name. Entry 1226, SL 1190 (-2.9%), target 1290 (+5.2%), R:R 1:1.78. Position size 16 × 1226 = ₹19,616 (~1.9% of portfolio) — small risk-budget fit (1.9% × 2.9% = 0.055% of portfolio risk, well under 0.5% cap). Validation: |1290-1226|=64, |1226-1190|=36, R:R = 64/36 = 1.78 ✓. Dividend record date today (May 8) — minor catalyst already priced. No binary event in next 3 sessions (next results May 30+)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1065.16,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1065 locks in +8.3% from entry. Trail gap 1.8% from CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from entry 820 to 822 — locks marginal gain, gap to CMP 829.95 is ~1.0% (at floor)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1341.52 already locks +6.6% on +16% mover. Gap 1.3% from CMP appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3030.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 3030 only 0.4% below CMP 3041 — below 1% floor. Cannot loosen per Rule 14c. Accept high stopout probability; thesis intact (defence Q4 +24% PAT). If stopped, accept the +0.2% locked-in result."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 = 1.4% below CMP 836.50, above 1% floor. Q4 record. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Newly entered, give the trade room. SL at 1465 (-1.7% from entry)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Newly entered, normal chop. SL at 1580 (-2.4% from entry)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 2755 = 1.1% below CMP. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold, SL at -1.1% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold, SL at -2.1% from CMP. Defence order book strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong, hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record + buyback at 12000. Hold to target 11260."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rejecting on cluster/risk-budget grounds: SRF (already held), PIDILITIND (already held), CAMS (already held), POLYCAB (already held), COFORGE (already held), MARICO (already held), PNBHOUSING (already held), ABCAPITAL (already held), BAJAJ-AUTO (already held), BHARATFORG (already held), GRSE (already held), WOCKPHARMA (already held). NEW candidates evaluated: NUVAMA (+19.7% — chasing extreme move, no entry), THERMAX (52w high +13% — extended), TATATECH (12.8x volume divergence — unclear thesis, skip), NBCC (+8.2% — no fundamental catalyst confirmed), RAMCOCEM (+4.8% on 2.5x vol — modest setup, lower priority), GABRIEL (+5.6% — sector cluster with auto book), APOLLOTYRE (+1.97% — modest), DABUR (have OPEN order at 487 from 382m ago — let it work), FINCABLES (+6.97% — would create cables cluster with POLYCAB), PERSISTENT (BEARISH research, skip), INDUSINDBK (governance overhang Rule 13, NO_ACTION). Admitting LAURUSLABS as the highest-conviction (BULLISH +0.10) new entry — defensive pharma rotation on risk-off day, fits cleanly with a +0.5% risk budget. DABUR pending order at 487 has not filled in 382m — CMP unclear from data; will reassess next cycle whether to cancel.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 61% (₹618K) with 13 CNC holdings. Day P&L +1.27% / +₹12,797 — strong session driven by Q4 winners (PNBHOUSING +10%, COFORGE +8%, CAMS +4%). Adding LAURUSLABS lifts deployment to ~63%, still within soft 80% target with room. Cluster check: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL = ~10% of portfolio), Capital Goods (GRSE + POLYCAB + BHARATFORG = ~13%), Chemicals (PIDILITIND + SRF = ~5.4%), Healthcare (WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS new = ~6.7%) — all well within 35% sector cap. VIX up +3.5% — risk-off in market but our book is positioned defensively (FMCG MARICO, pharma WOCK+LAURUS, gold GOLDBEES). Day-12 lesson applied: not preempting any SLs; letting the book run. GRSE SL is uncomfortably tight but per Rule 14c cannot be loosened — accept the structural risk. Cumulative experiment P&L +0.96%."
}
